authority: Product-local applicability candidates for existing assets, reused components, previous approvals, existing tests, and delta changes.

items.name: Previous project review result
items.source: Replace with the previous baseline, review record, or release note.
items.delta_scope: Unknown until the current project scope and baseline are reviewed.
items.assumptions: The old result may have used different requirements, configuration, environment, or acceptance criteria.
items.required_review: Compare previous criteria with current requirements and record current applicability.
items.required_revalidation: Re-run or justify each affected gate before claiming current pass.

items.name: Existing design document
items.source: Replace with the design document path or controlled record id.
items.intended_use: Candidate input for current architecture/design work.
items.delta_scope: Interfaces, timing, safety/security impact, and downstream tests must be checked.
items.assumptions: The design may no longer match stakeholder requirements or current constraints.
items.required_review: Run impact review before using it as current design evidence.
items.required_revalidation: Plan regression and trace review for affected requirements and interfaces.

items.name: Existing test evidence
items.source: Replace with the test report, CI run, validation record, or lab notebook path.
items.delta_scope: Configuration, environment, acceptance criteria, and observed behavior must match the current project.
items.assumptions: An old passing test may not cover current requirements, configuration, or risk.
items.required_review: Confirm whether the old test can be reused, rerun, or only cited as history.
items.required_revalidation: Record the rerun result or the reviewed justification for not rerunning.
